device_probe.device_name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition

colab_invocation.cell_1:
!git clone --branch claude/syn3a-whole-cell-simulator-REjHC https://github.com/Nikku03/cell.git /content/cell
%cd /content/cell
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/content/cell')

notes_for_reviewer: Warm-up batch (size 1) is run once before timed batches so tokenizer/model load isn't charged to any scan point.
torch.cuda.synchronize is called before and after each timed region.
Sequences are synthetic random AA; length distribution is Gaussian around 300 residues to approximate Syn3A's protein length distribution.
fp16 LM + fp32 trunk mixed-precision is used for ESM-2 alone (no structure prediction, so the pLDDT fp16 issue doesn't apply here).
